name: get_daily_activity
description: Retrieve daily activity summaries for a date range. Each summary includes step count, active and total calories burned, active time in minutes, sedentary time, and an overall activity score. Useful for monitoring physical activity patterns.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to one day before end_date if omitted.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if omitted.

parameters.name: next_token
parameters.description: Pagination token for retrieving the next page of results.
